column1: The dashboard loads really fast now and the UI is super clean. Love the new dark mode toggle!
I keep getting a 500 error when I try to upload CSV files larger than 5MB. This is really frustrating.
Sentiment analysis results are mostly accurate but sometimes classifies sarcastic comments as positive.
It would be great if you could add Jira integration so we can push user stories directly from the analysis.
The keyword cloud visualization is beautiful and helps me quickly spot recurring themes in feedback.
Export to PDF is broken - it just downloads an empty file every time I try.
The onboarding flow was straightforward. I had my first analysis running within 5 minutes of signing up.
Could you add support for analyzing feedback in Spanish and Portuguese? We have a LATAM user base.
The analysis takes too long for large datasets. 10,000 comments shouldn't take over 30 minutes.
Overall the product is decent. The feature sentiment breakdown is useful but the action items feel generic.
